name: run_compute_requester_subagent
description: Compute-requester entry tool. Deterministic flow: enroll a fresh ATProto account via Welcome Mat, write a com.fedproxy.rbac record granting role=root full CRUD on its own account, then write the com.publicdomainrelay.temp.compute.vm and wrapping com.publicdomainrelay.temp.market.rfp on that same new account. Returns { did, handle, rbacUri, vmUri, rfpUri }.

handle.description: Handle to claim on the new account.

accept_uri.description: Optional at:// URI of the parent's accept record. Used as the actx seed so the RBAC sub matches the OIDC token sub the dispatcher will issue.
